response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. No professional C++ experience on Windows in the last decade (only a brief 6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Primary expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js — none of which align with the C++/Windows/finance stack required.
strengths: Solid 10+ years of professional software engineering experience
Strong testing discipline (TDD, workshops, test frameworks authored)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated via talks and workshops
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience (only ~6 months in 2014-2015)
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; primary DB is MongoDB

key_factors.factor: Lacks mandatory C++ on Windows experience
No financial services or capital markets domain
